LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF TAMARA KASAP'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT TO ADD CAUSES OF ACTION IS GRANTED. THE MOTION SUBSTANTIALLY COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1324, THERE IS A LIBERAL POLICY IN FAVOR OF AMENDMENT, THE AMENDMENTS DO NOT SUBSTANTIALLY CHANGE THE TENOR OF THE CASE, AND THE PREJUDICE TO DEFENDANT IS MINIMAL. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: IRENE L. TOFFT, CSR # 12913 (302/EHG)

Plaintiff Tamara Kasaps Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint To Add Causes Of Action
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF TAMARA KASAP'S Motion To Amend Complaint To Add Causes Of Action is Granted. The motion substantially complies with CRC 3.1324, there is a liberal policy in favor of amendment, the amendments do not substantially change the tenor of the case, and the prejudice to defendant is minimal. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913
